arts.ttl: Juventus and Inter Milan vying to sign Barcelona star next summer
arts.sum: In recent weeks, there has been a lot of speculation about the future of Barcelona defender Andreas Christensen. The 28-year-old has been out for the last four months with a troubling Achilles tendon injury, and during that period, his prominence within Can Barca has dropped significantly.
